violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

Portable fan near the ice machine has an accumulation of dust. The nonfood contact surfaces of the can opener base, and mixer have an accumulation of food debris. Due to fire extinguisher release, all equipment and utensils were in the process of being cleaned and sanitized during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025
The floors and walls in the kitchen were impacted by the fire extinguisher release, and were in the process of being cleaned during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

The floor in the elevator which is used to transport food carts is in poor repair, with a piece of flooring missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/19/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener base, mixer, and refrigerators have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025

The floors in the kitchen especially around door frames, and the window ledge outside the manager's office have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025

The floor, and some walls in the kitchen are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC stated the kitchen is scheduled for renovation this month. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025
